setup_sql: CREATE TABLE quackgis.main.catalog_fixture(id BIGINT, name VARCHAR, geom_wkb BLOB, geog BLOB)
copy_sql: COPY quackgis.main.catalog_fixture (id, name, geom_wkb, geog) FROM STDIN

spatial_type_lookup.sql: SELECT t.typname, t.typtype, t.typelem, r.rngsubtype, t.typbasetype, n.nspname, t.typrelid FROM pg_catalog.pg_type t LEFT OUTER JOIN pg_catalog.pg_range r ON r.rngtypid = t.oid INNER JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON t.typnamespace = n.oid WHERE t.oid = $1

geometry.query: SELECT geom_wkb FROM quackgis.main.catalog_fixture ORDER BY id
geometry.text_query: SELECT geom_wkb FROM quackgis.main.catalog_fixture WHERE id = 1

geography.query: SELECT geog FROM quackgis.main.catalog_fixture ORDER BY id
geography.text_query: SELECT geog FROM quackgis.main.catalog_fixture WHERE id = 1

metadata_queries.sql: SELECT table_schema, table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_catalog = 'quackgis' AND table_schema = 'main' AND table_name = 'catalog_fixture'
SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_catalog = 'quackgis' AND table_schema = 'main' AND table_name = 'catalog_fixture' ORDER BY ordinal_position

ordinary_catalog_query.sql: SELECT count(*)::BIGINT FROM pg_catalog.pg_type WHERE oid IN (90001, 90002)
